NCT03397121.name: ORION-9

allOutcomes.title: LDL-C % change from baseline at Day 510 (primary)

NCT03397121.snippet: Source: Raal FJ et al. NEJM 2020;382:1520-1530 (ORION-9 HeFH).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Randomization
evidence.source: Raal FJ et al. NEJM 2020;382:1520-1530, CONSORT
evidence.text: 482 adults with heterozygous familial hypercholesterolaemia (HeFH) and LDL-C ≥2.6 mmol/L despite maximum tolerated statin ± ezetimibe were randomized 1:1 to inclisiran sodium 300 mg SC (n=242) or placebo (n=240) on Days 1, 90, 270, and 450.

evidence.label: Primary Outcome — LDL-C % change at Day 510
evidence.source: Raal FJ et al. NEJM 2020;382:1520-1530, Figure 2
evidence.text: Placebo-corrected percent change in LDL-C at Day 510 was −39.7 (95% CI, −43.7 to −35.7; P<0.001). Time-adjusted percent change (Day 90–540) was −38.1 (95% CI, −41.8 to −34.4).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~Participants may be included if they meet all of the following inclusion criteria prior to randomization:~1. Male or female participants ≥18 years of age.~2. History of HeFH with a diagnosis of HeFH by genetic testing; and/or a documented history of untreated LDL-C of >190 mg/dL, and a family history of familial hypercholesterolemia, elevated cholesterol or early heart disease that may indicate familial hypercholesterolemia.~3. NCT03399370.name: ORION-10

allOutcomes.title: LDL-C % change from baseline at Day 510 (primary)

NCT03399370.snippet: Source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519 (ORION-10 ASCVD).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Randomization
evidence.source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519, CONSORT
evidence.text: 1561 US adults with ASCVD and LDL-C ≥70 mg/dL despite maximum tolerated statins were randomized 1:1 to inclisiran 300 mg SC (n=781) or placebo (n=780) on Days 1, 90, 270, 450.

evidence.label: Primary Outcome — LDL-C % change at Day 510
evidence.source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519, Figure 1
evidence.text: Placebo-corrected percent change in LDL-C at Day 510: −52.3 (95% CI, −55.7 to −48.8; P<0.001). Time-adjusted change Day 90–540: −53.8 (95% CI, −56.2 to −51.3).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Male or female participants ≥18 years of age.~2. History of ASCVD (coronary heart disease [CHD], cardiovascular disease [CVD], or peripheral arterial disease [PAD]).~3. Serum LDL-C ≥1.8 millimole (mmol)/liter (L) (≥70 mg/dL).~4. Fasting triglyceride <4.52 mmol/L (<400 mg/dL) at screening.~5. Participants on statins should be receiving a maximally tolerated dose.~6. NCT03400800.name: ORION-11

allOutcomes.title: LDL-C % change from baseline at Day 510 (primary)

NCT03400800.snippet: Source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519 (ORION-11 ASCVD or ASCVD risk-equivalent, non-US).

evidence.label: Enrollment & Randomization
evidence.source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519, CONSORT
evidence.text: 1617 adults with ASCVD or ASCVD risk-equivalents and LDL-C ≥70/100 mg/dL despite maximum tolerated statins (non-US sites) were randomized 1:1 to inclisiran 300 mg SC (n=810) or placebo (n=807).

evidence.label: Primary Outcome — LDL-C % change at Day 510
evidence.source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020;382:1507-1519, Figure 1
evidence.text: Placebo-corrected percent change in LDL-C at Day 510: −49.9 (95% CI, −53.1 to −46.6; P<0.001). Time-adjusted change Day 90–540: −49.2 (95% CI, −51.6 to −46.8).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~Participants may be included if they meet all of the following inclusion criteria prior to randomization:~1. Male or female participants ≥18 years of age.~2. History of ASCVD (coronary heart disease [CHD], cardiovascular disease [CVD], or peripheral arterial disease [PAD]).~3. Serum LDL-C ≥1.8 millimole (mmol)/liter (L) (≥70 mg/dL).~4.
